sections.paragraph:
pr. n.-

(1) of a man (i.q. מְתוּאֵל “man of God”), [Bethuel], the father of Laban and Rebecca, Gen 22:22, 23 Gen 22:23 24:15 , 24 Gen 24:24, 47 Gen 24:47, 50 Gen 24:50 25:20 28:2 , Gen 28:5.

(2) of a place (pr. “tarrying of God,” from بتا i.q. בּוּת), a town in the tribe of Simeon, 1Ch 4:30, which in Jos 19:4 is written contr. בְּתוּל. In Jos 15:30, in the same series of cities (as to this remarkable corruption see Relandi Palæstina, p. 152, 153), there is found כְּסִיל.
